__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Azure Monitor managed Prometheus or any Prometheus data source.

description: Azure Managed Lustre key operational metrics from vmss-metrics-exporter: OST capacity, MDT capacity/files, client throughput/ops, latency, HSM reliability, freshness, and inventory.

panels.title: Filesystems observed
panels.description: Number of Azure Managed Lustre filesystems discovered in the latest collection.

targets.expr: max(azure_managed_lustre_filesystem_total{job="$job"})

panels.title: Min OST available %
panels.description: Primary data-capacity pressure signal.

targets.expr: min(max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, ostnum) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

panels.title: Min MDT files free %
panels.description: Primary metadata file/inode exhaustion signal.

targets.expr: min(max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_files_free_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: Min MDT bytes available %
panels.description: MDT storage-capacity pressure signal.

targets.expr: min(max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: Collector freshness
panels.description: Seconds since last successful Managed Lustre collection.

targets.expr: time() - max(azure_managed_lustre_last_success_timestamp_seconds{job="$job"})

panels.title: Max OST sample age
panels.description: Maximum Azure Monitor OST sample age in seconds.

targets.expr: max(time() - azure_managed_lustre_ost_sample_timestamp_seconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"})

panels.title: Max MDT sample age
panels.description: Maximum Azure Monitor MDT sample age in seconds.

targets.expr: max(time() - azure_managed_lustre_mdt_sample_timestamp_seconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

panels.title: Errors 5m rate
panels.description: Rate of failed Managed Lustre collection calls over five minutes.

targets.expr: sum(rate(azure_managed_lustre_collection_errors_total{job="$job"}[5m]))

panels.title: Lowest OST available % trend
panels.description: Bottom-N OST capacity pressure. When Azure Monitor returns aggregate metrics, ostnum is all.

targets.expr: bottomk($top_n, $rank_by by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, ostnum) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

panels.title: Lowest MDT files free % trend
panels.description: Bottom-N MDT metadata file/inode pressure.

targets.expr: bottomk($top_n, $rank_by by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_files_free_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: Lowest MDT bytes available % trend
panels.description: Bottom-N MDT storage pressure.

targets.expr: bottomk($top_n, $rank_by by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: Client read/write throughput by filesystem
panels.description: Client data transfer rate grouped by filesystem.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, sum by (filesystem_name) (azure_managed_lustre_client_read_throughput_bytes_per_second{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

topk($top_n, sum by (filesystem_name) (azure_managed_lustre_client_write_throughput_bytes_per_second{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

panels.title: Client read/write ops by filesystem
panels.description: Client read and write operation counts grouped by filesystem.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, sum by (filesystem_name) (azure_managed_lustre_client_read_ops{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

topk($top_n, sum by (filesystem_name) (azure_managed_lustre_client_write_ops{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

panels.title: OST client latency / ops
panels.description: OST operation latency and operation count by filesystem and operation.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, ostnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_client_latency_milliseconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, ostnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_client_ops{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"}))

panels.title: MDT client latency / ops
panels.description: MDT operation latency and operation count by filesystem and operation.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, mdtnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_client_latency_milliseconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, mdtnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_client_ops{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: Max HSM action errors
panels.description: Maximum HSM action errors across selected MDTs. Any non-zero value should be investigated.

targets.expr: max(azure_managed_lustre_hsm_action_errors{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

panels.title: Max HSM in-flight
panels.description: Maximum HSM in-flight requests across selected MDTs. Sustained growth can indicate HSM backlog.

targets.expr: max(azure_managed_lustre_hsm_current_requests{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

panels.title: HSM action errors trend
panels.description: Top-N MDTs by HSM action errors (Azure Monitor HSMActionErrors). Non-zero values indicate HSM action failures and should be investigated.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_hsm_action_errors{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: HSM in-flight requests trend
panels.description: Top-N MDTs by HSM in-flight requests (Azure Monitor HSMCurrentRequests). Sustained growth indicates HSM backlog.

targets.expr: topk($top_n, max by (filesystem_name, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_hsm_current_requests{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"}))

panels.title: All filesystem current key metrics
panels.description: Unbounded current Lustre metrics for every selected filesystem. This table is intentionally not Top-N limited, so every discovered cluster with Azure Monitor samples is visible.

targets.expr: max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, ostnum) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_files_free_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_bytes_available_percent{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

sum by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location) (azure_managed_lustre_client_read_throughput_bytes_per_second{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"})

sum by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location) (azure_managed_lustre_client_write_throughput_bytes_per_second{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, ostnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_ost_client_latency_milliseconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", ostnum=~"$ostnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum, operation) (azure_managed_lustre_mdt_client_latency_milliseconds{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_hsm_action_errors{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, mdtnum) (azure_managed_lustre_hsm_current_requests{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location", mdtnum=~"$mdtnum"})

panels.title: Discovered Lustre filesystems
panels.description: All Azure Managed Lustre filesystems discovered from Resource Graph, including filesystems with no current OST/MDT Azure Monitor samples.

targets.expr: max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location, sku_tier) (azure_managed_lustre_filesystem_info{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location"})

max by (subscription_id, resource_group, filesystem_name, location) (azure_managed_lustre_filesystem_storage_capacity_tib{job="$job", subscription_id=~"$subscription_id", resource_group=~"$resource_group", filesystem_name=~"$filesystem_name", location=~"$location"})

title: Azure Managed Lustre Key Metrics
